name: Pineapple-Walnut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, cream together the cottage cheese and sour cream until smooth.
2. Add the crushed pineapple, chopped walnuts, and lemon zest to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Suggested Dippers:
Vanilla Wafers
Chicken
Pears
Strawberries
